productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Grey Shirt
description: Composition Grey shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with double buttoned cuffs, a spread collar, a full buttoned placket and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Classic Benetton style shirt for men. This united colors of benetton shirt with its soft, luxe fabric is for the fashion conscious urban male. Wear it with formal pants, an understated belt and shoes from red tape. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
